payload.title: cleanup: remove remaining astrologer/spiritual references from production code
payload.body: Codebase audit found 15+ remaining references to astrologer, sacred items, and spiritual content across production code. Remove all of them: AuthService.requireAstrologer(), AuthController astrologer_slug session, ApiController $astrologers variable, MediaService astrologers context, admin dashboard astrologer links, SupportBotService astrologer responses, AgentController astrologerCount, robots.txt astrologer disallow, PublicController 'sacred items' SEO string.

evidence: AuthController: removed astrologer_slug from Google OAuth + login sessions, removed astrologer role block
MediaService: removed 'astrologers' from all 3 context arrays
Admin dashboard: removed Astrologers card, updated text to 'Manage sessions, hospital facilities'
Admin media: removed 'Astrologers' option from context dropdown
Admin resource: removed astrologers from collection check + data-field ternary
SupportBotService: removed astrologer keyword trigger + response text
AgentController: removed astrologerCount from AI context
PublicController: 'sacred items'→'therapy and wellness products' in SEO
Consult view: 'Vedic Astrology'→'Therapy & Wellness', review summary key 'astrologer'→'product'
